data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step regarding the split payment scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of splitting payment between two cards, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case outlines various needs related to payment processing but does not provide specific evidence of how split payments are handled. This lack of specific evidence leads to a conclusion of inconclusiveness regarding the requirement coverage for this exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of the system's capability to handle split payments between two cards.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the split payment functionality.
